privileged_info_summary: The task configures Microsoft Edge with three real, publicly-accessible OSINT services: Wayback Machine (Internet Archive's web archive at web.archive.org, launched 2001), crt.sh (Certificate Transparency search tool), and Shodan (IoT search engine launched 2009 by John Matherly at shodan.io). All URL templates are verified against official service documentation: Wayback Machine uses https://web.archive.org/web/*/%s format, crt.sh uses https://crt.sh/?q=%s parameter, and Shodan uses https://www.shodan.io/search?query=%s. The test domain example.com is an IANA-reserved domain per RFC 2606, reserved since 1999 for documentation and testing purposes. All metadata claims are accurate; no synthetic data is involved.
